title.en: F-Centres — Trapped Electron in an Anion Vacancy

subtitle.en: irradiate NaCl or KCl with X-rays and a chloride ion leaves; an electron drops into the empty hole and absorbs in the visible — the crystal turns yellow/violet
subtitle.ko: X선이 NaCl·KCl을 때리면 Cl이 떠나고 전자가 공공에 갇혀 가시광 흡수 — 결정이 황색·자색으로

description.en: Lattice schematic with electron in vacancy + crystal swatch + visible-band absorption notch. Toggle host (NaCl/KCl/KBr/LiF) — F-band shifts with lattice spacing.
description.ko: 격자 schematic + 공공의 전자 + 가시광 흡수 notch. Host 토글(NaCl/KCl/KBr/LiF) — F-band가 격자 간격 따라 이동.
